song.title: Are You Washed in the Blood
song.author: Elisha Hoffman
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Have you been to Jesus For the cleansing power? Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb? Are you fully trusting in His grace this hour? Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?
[C1] Chorus Are you washed in the blood, In the soul-cleansing blood of the Lamb? Are your garments spotless are they white as snow? Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?
[V2] 2) Are you walking daily By the Savior's side? Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb? Do you rest each moment in the Crucified? Are you washed in the blood of the Lamb?
[V3] 3) When the Bridegroom cometh, Will your robes be white? Pure and white In the blood of the Lamb? Will your souls be ready For His presence bright And be washed In the blood of the Lamb?
[V4] 4) Lay aside your garments That are stained with sin And be washed In the blood of the Lamb. There's a fountain Flowing for the soul unclean. O, be washed In the blood of the Lamb!
[C] We are washed in the blood, In the soul-cleansing blood of the Lamb! Yes, our garments are spotless; They are white as snow We are washed in the blood of the Lamb!
